storyInfo: Greynuty searches for Sona in a furor, only to discover that Sona has done a mountain of things she never would've imagined...

attributes.content: Sona! Sona, where are you?!
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: ...You're being a little loud, Ashlock.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: Sorry, Justyna, I didn't see you there.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Wait, what are you doing in front of Sona's room? Are you looking for her too?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Mm.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: Where is she?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Don't know.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: ...Whatever, I'll spare her for now.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: I know you only just joined us. It's normal to have questions.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: You can ask me. I might be able to help.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: ...No, it isn't about the Knightclub.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: I wanted to tell Sona I'll help out at her bar after all.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: Oh, I see then. True, I can't help with that.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Hold on!
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: What did you just say? Bar? Sona?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Mm. Didn't you know?
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: I... Was I meant to know?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: I don't know.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: So what did you need her for?
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: I need her so I can tear her head off.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: But change of plans. I'm going to figure out just when the hell she opened a bar behind my back, and then she dies.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: So can you tell me why she has a bar, and also, how you know about it?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: ...Okay.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: I'm still new to the Knightclub. There's a lot I don't know about it.
Last night, Sona sent me a message, inviting me to meet her at a bar.
I thought she wanted to talk about Knightclub stuff, but I was wrong.
So. You've come.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: ...Why are you... standing behind the counter?
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: Because I am now the stand-in owner of this private bar.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: ...What?
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: Haven't gotten a chance to tell Ashley and the rest about it yet. You're the first to know.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: Why?
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: At first, I was just coming here to relax from time to time.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: After a while, I got pretty chummy with the old boss of the place.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: And then I found out he used to be a director at the G.C.C., before he got targeted for offending some Knightclub.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: He couldn't take that. Quit his job in anger, opened up this little place.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: I helped unhassle a few hassles for him. He's recently rediscovered his passion for his old work, and now he's gone back to where he says he belongs.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: So, he handed the bar over for me to manage.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: ...I feel like, you just described a dramatic story very undramatically.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: You wanna hear it? I can tell you over a drink.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: I thought—you invited me here... to orient me into the Knightclub.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: All I can tell you is the booze rack here's pretty darn good.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: So you asked me out for drinks?
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: Unfortunately! I asked you out so you could watch the bar for me. I've got stuff to handle later tonight.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: We can all come here for drinks next time.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: Why me?
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: Cause... you don't have to do much of anything here, really. You just pour your patrons a drink, listen to their stories, and tell 'em what they need to hear every now and then.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: And my gut says you're the best listener out of all of us.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: So how about it?
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: ...I can try.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: Okay, come over here, I'll teach you some bartending fundamentals...
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: After she left, a steady stream of Infected arrived. She must have made sure people in the club knew about it.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: By chatting with them, I more or less got a handle on the Knightclub's present situation.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: Whether it was on purpose or not, I'm glad she gave me that opportunity.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: Your turn, Ashlock.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: What has she done to make you want to kill her?
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: She—
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Hey, what're you two doing here too? Where's Sona?
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: Wish I knew.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Oh. Well, sure, I'll wait too then.
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: ...What have you got there, Iwona?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Oh, this? Camcorder. Sona lent it to me.
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: A camcorder? Tch, I knew it, that scoundrel...
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: What are you doing with it, though?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Uh, nothing big.
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: Sona spent all last night teaching me how to shoot with it. I'm just here to give it back.
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: Ohh. I see...
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Excuse me? Last night?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Yeah, last night.
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: What the hell was she doing at your place last night?!
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: She was there 'cause she was there. Is that weird?
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: She was with US last night!
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: And since when did the almighty Wild Mane Knight want to learn photography? For that matter, when did SONA learn it? EVERYTHING about this is weird!
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Ashlock, I think it's just as weird that you came here wanting to kill her...
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: I... I—*sigh* I'll explain that in a bit.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: First, Iwona, tell me what happened last night.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Oh, sure.
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: Lately, we've been doing more and more work, taking more and more Infected in.
I'm proud of what we do, but that doesn't solve our need for more funds to settle all our Infected down somewhere.
And competition winnings are our most direct source of income, so for the last while, I've been trying to win more matches, get more of that cash.
But—patience ain't my strong suit.
Sona, I'm here.
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: Cool.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: Funding-wise, we're gonna have issues caring for our club's Infected, I know it.
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: Now, I bet you called me here to chat about my recent win-loss.
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: I know, I haven't been putting up good results lately, but I—
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: Iwona, don't stretch yourself thin.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: But—I wanna put in the work for our club!
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: Catch.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: What the... A camcorder?
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: Sure is.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: I made a friend lately, an elderly guy. He taught me some photography tricks, and tipped me off about a certain contact who'll let us make cash for shooting.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: Contact's anonymous, only cares about the end product, so the work's open to Infected too.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: So you're telling me, it's time I tried a side job?
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: Exactly. You're not alone—everyone goes through rough spots from time to time. Couldn't hurt to shake things up.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: But... I don't know a damn thing about using a camera, though?
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: That's fine, I didn't either at first. Turns out it's not all that complicated.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: First off, look here. This is the shutter, this is the lens, this is your screen.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: You focus the lens on what you wanna shoot, press the shutter, and whatever you're shooting gets recorded in here...
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: H-Huh, alright...
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: Real simple, ain't it? There's a lotta skill to camerawork—I only started picking it up myself recently.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: First, what we wanna do is learn how lighting affects a photo...
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: Um, uh, mrm...
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: ...And then Sona spent a solid hour walking me through it.
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: Can you use it now?
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: I... gave up in the end.
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: Well, it's only your first time...
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: No, Justyna, you don't understand.
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: Imagine Sona's telling you about lighting and composition and focal length and all this stuff like it's obvious, but you don't get it, but she doesn't get that you don't get it—
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: And you're like, I'm screwed.
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: Sona was trying her damndest to teach me. I know, I know she means well for me.
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: But I seriously can't do it.
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: I can—not—UNDERSTAND THIS STUFF!
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: Maybe... you could try learning something else?
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: No, Sona didn't teach me for nothing.
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: I'm gonna remember last night's photography lesson forever. From now on, every time I step into the arena, I'm gonna use what I went through to motivate me—
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: If I don't clinch a victory in there, I'm gonna have to learn photography with Sona.'
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: You could tell me to go and mend things with my family right now and it still wouldn't be as cruel as that. This way, I'm determined to win.
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: ...That's one way to make use of it, I suppose.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: Ashlock, why did you suddenly go... silent?
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: ... (Muttering) Photography. So that's what it was about.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Ashlock?
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: You were curious why I wanted to kill Sona, right?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: I'm... not that curious anymore, actually.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: No, this concerns both of your futures, so I'm obligated to tell you.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: It's that serious?!
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: ...No, I think things are getting less and less serious.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: Sometimes, I feel like, even though we've been fighting together for so long, I still don't understand what goes on in her head.
Sometimes it's like nothing's happening in there at all, but other times, it's like she's thinking thirty steps ahead.
And what pisses me off is, she never tells me how she arrives at any of her ideas.
She didn't tell me this time either.
Ashley, aren't you supposed to be up in the arena right now?
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: Look at the message you sent!
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: 'Don't worry about the match, Ashley. I'll be behind the scenes pulling out all the stops for you.'
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Yeah, I told you not to worry about it, right?
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: Who reads a message like this and thinks 'okay then, I won't worry'?!
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Jeez, Ashley, you just love stressing out for other people.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: So, just what are you doing here?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Ever since the Radiant Knight came back, certain people have been pretty restless.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: Certain people?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: I dunno who exactly, I just know they definitely don't want what's best for the Infected, and the Radiant Knight's putting them in crisis mode.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: Otherwise, they wouldn't have gone for the ancient old tactic of a PR video swaparoo.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: You don't mean...
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Yup. Yours, Ashley.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: Look, they still haven't given up.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: How did you find this place?
attributes.name: A Bought-Out Knight

attributes.content: If I said... a friend told me, wouldja believe me?
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: Hmph. Who'd make friends with an Infected?
attributes.name: A Bought-Out Knight

attributes.content: Either way, now that you know we're here, we'll just have to dispatch the two of you!
attributes.name: A Bought-Out Knight

attributes.content: Ashley, ready to warm up for a match?
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: ...Way ahead of you.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Where's Ashlock Knight?! She's the one I came to see!
attributes.name: An Excited Spectator

attributes.content: Yeah! Ashlock Knight's the whole reason anyone came here! I want a refund!
attributes.name: An Angry Spectator

attributes.content: (Whispers) You still haven't found her?!
attributes.name: Greatmouth Mob

attributes.content: No!
attributes.name: Staffer

attributes.content: (Whispers) What do we do, then?! She was top billing tonight!
attributes.name: Greatmouth Mob

attributes.content: I don't know either! ...Shit, wait, I just got word from the director.
attributes.name: Staffer

attributes.content: He says, roll Ashlock Knight's PR reel first, because she'll be out any moment.
attributes.name: Staffer

attributes.content: (Whispers) ...You for real?
attributes.name: Greatmouth Mob

attributes.content: Director says he'll shoulder the blame.
attributes.name: Staffer

attributes.content: (Whispers) Then we'll do it.
attributes.name: Greatmouth Mob

attributes.content: Now I know you're all hungry to see Ashlock Knight burst onto the scene, but hold your beasties—Pinus Sylvestris Knightclub has just let us in on her brand new PR reel.
attributes.name: Greatmouth Mob

attributes.content: So why don't we get the refreshments out and watch!
attributes.name: Greatmouth Mob

attributes.content: Ashley, how come you never like to talk to the press at our conferences?
That's not what it means to be a knight.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: My one duty in the arena is to defeat the enemy.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Aw, you know if you talked a little more, your fans would love it.
I don't take to the field in order to please them.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Also, stop filming me.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Oh yeah, I put all the letters from your fans in the storeroom for you.
*sigh*... Thank you.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Sure, Ashley tells us she's under no obligation to serve the fans, but what's the truth? Let's take a look and find out.
Thank you for your letter, and I appreciate your support.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: I sincerely wish you and your lover a happy life together. When you decide a date for the wedding, please let me know, and I will send a card to congratulate you.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Signed, Ashlock Knight—Greynuty.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: ...That should be sufficient.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Now for the next letter.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: ...*sigh* How come I have so many letters? I hope I can reply to all of these before dinner.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Would you look at our Ashlock Knight—it turns out she really cherishes everyone who cherishes her.
Sure, she's a little clumsy with her words, but she makes up for it by letting her every action speak for itself.
What's that sound?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Oh, she's about to notice me. Time to go.
Ashlock Knight's such a hero on the field, though! Is she really THAT cute in private?!
attributes.name: An Excited Spectator

attributes.content: I had no idea she had this side to her, yet I called myself her fan! I-I-I—I'm gonna go buy all her merch right now!
attributes.name: A Now-Gleeful Spectator

attributes.content: Phew—how's that? Turned out pretty good, right?
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: Sona! Wh-What the hell did you just broadcast?!
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Well, a cute slice of your life, right?
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: Relax, I edited it myself. Everything sensitive got scrubbed out.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: Isn't that meant to be a promotional video for our Knightclub?!
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Yeah, so I've been thinking about that this whole time.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: Our club's not gonna beat any of the corp-backed Knightclubs when it comes to cash or clout.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: We'll never be a match for them if we go up against them using common sense. We need a wildcard.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: WHAT KIND OF WILDCARD WAS THAT?!
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Think about it, Ashley. The way other Knightclubs promote their knights, it's so showy, so superficial.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: But I think, what really endears people to someone is those cute, awkward moments no one else knows about.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: And that's where our Knightclub has the others beat!
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: We're always working alongside each other, so we know each other's charm points down to a T!
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: You...
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: You just relax. I'm willing to bet you everyone will love these promos.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: I mean, the whole time I was editing them, I couldn't help thinking how cute they were!
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: ...You're not telling me, you edited EVEN MORE of those?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Yeah. Yours, Iwona's, and a couple other members'.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: I was considering doing one for our new recruit Justyna too, but I didn't have much inspiration for her at the time, so for now we just gotta get to know each other better.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: YOU—
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Ashlock Knight, what are you doing here?! We've been looking for you forever!
attributes.name: Staffer

attributes.content: Huh? What's Flametail Knight doing here t... yeek! What happened to all those people?!
attributes.name: Staffer

attributes.content: You go tell the director he's got a little trash to sweep up here. I figure the garbage truck'll be passing by soon.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: Er, okay. Anyway, Ashlock Knight, come with me quick, your match is underway!
attributes.name: Staffer

attributes.content: You wait here, Sona.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: I'm heading into the arena to dispatch my opponent, and then I'm coming back to dispatch you.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Do you see now? That's why I'm here to end her life.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: I see.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: More and more, I feel like joining Pinus Sylvestris was the right decision.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: ...And what exactly in our conversation could've led you to THAT conclusion?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Lots.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: If my guess is correct, the bar owner Sona took over for is the one who taught her photography.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: And at the same time, he's the 'friend' she said told her about the PR problem—the director for your match.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: ...I'm sorry?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: In that bar, she met the ex-director turned bar owner, made friends with him, then learned some photography from him later.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: Not only that, she cleared up the haze hanging over him, and made him willing to hand management of the bar over to her and return to his own work.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: Finally, he noticed something was wrong with your promo, and notified Sona straight away.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: That's my understanding.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: For serious?
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: All I got out of it was that last night, she taught Justyna how to run a bar, then sprinted over to my place to teach me how to work the camera, then went and solved the thing with Greynuty's PR vid for her.
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: I knew she was fast, but that's screwy fast!
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: Seen another way, it shows that she never lets the problems each member of her Knightclub faces escape her.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: You're right. Incredible, she is, that Sona.
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: Wait, wait, why do you two admire her MORE now?!
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Because seeing the reality, I have to admit... she's a leader far beyond what I imagined.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: Maybe she's just lucky, you don't know.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Then I have a question.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: I once had the idea of establishing a Knightclub, and looked into it. So I know—
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: It'd be almost impossible for an Infected to form a Knightclub focused on Infected.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: So in the course of founding Pinus Sylvestris, did you ever run into any difficulties?
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: Now you mention it, after Sona said she was going to found a Knightclub, there was a little while before she brought me straight here.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: And told me that as of today, this would be Pinus Sylvestris's base.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: ...That settles it then. Every last thing I thought impossibly hard to deal with, she dealt with.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: How hard?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Harder than you actually getting to tear off her head today, perhaps.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: ...Tch.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: She's always like this, never telling me a damn thing.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: I haven't known her for long, but I've never once seen her just say what's on her mind like that.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: Ashlock, you're her closest companion. If she were ever in a difficult place, I don't think she'd keep it from you.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: What are you trying to tell me?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: That maybe, you've gotten it into your head... that she won't share her burdens with you.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: But maybe... the reason she never tells you is just because... none of it registers as difficult for her.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: From her perspective, she's not hiding problems she doesn't want to drag you into, she's just...
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: Dealing with things naturally as they come, and there's never much about them she needs to share.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: That... does seem like the way she'd do things.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Wild Mane just said Sona did three things yesterday.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: But maybe, it's just that we only know of three things.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: Who knows. Maybe there were five, ten, or even more.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: To Sona, the photography Iwona found so hard might've just been one of the many skills in her pocket.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: Maybe, a day in her life is more full than any of us can imagine.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: Man, that was fun stuff. I've gotta find someone to spar with me, ASAP.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: Sona?!
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Huh? Hey, the whole gang's here.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: Morning, Ashley, everyone.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: Morn... wait, why did you come out of the training grounds?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Don't tell me you were there all night?!
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Sure was.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: After I got back from the arena last night, I watched a little Left-hand Knight footage, did a little solo training.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: Slept right there in the training grounds.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: ...sakes.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: You—You did all of that yesterday and STILL felt like staying behind and training?!
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: By all of that, you mean... all of what exactly?
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: Taking Justyna to the bar, teaching Iwona photography, sorting out my PR reel? Was that not enough for you?
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Ahh—that's just 'cause everything just happened to line up in the evening.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: Whassup, Ashley?
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: You look like you're gonna fall apart there. What's wrong? Talk to me. Who knows, I might be able to help?
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: You're the cause, okay...
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Me...? Something wrong with me?
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: Look, putting that aside, studying those Left-hand Knight tapes gave me a pretty fun idea I'm sitting on right now.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: C'mon, let's go test it out.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: Tch. I've decided.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: You filmed me in secret, so now I'm going to film you back.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Sure! I was just thinking I had no one to shoot my own promo.
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: All day today, I'm going to follow you. Wherever you go, I'll go with you.
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: I'm going to see just how much you can do in a single day!
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Haha, that's a lotta pep in your step for you, Ashley! Heck yeah!
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: And we'll start with me laying you flat on the ground!
attributes.name: Greynuty

attributes.content: Let's roll!
attributes.name: Sona

attributes.content: ...Hey, wait up, Sona, take your camcorder back first!
attributes.name: Iwona

attributes.content: ...The Infected have no place to go.
attributes.name: Justyna

attributes.content: But together with these people, with Flametail Knight Sona... perhaps, Justyna the Infected can go anywhere.
attributes.name: Justyna
